testcase.name: testCreateRequest

error.message: Request processing failed: org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: could not execute statement [Referential integrity constraint violation: "FKK4ALALWU62GJ4TFBGFEFLL3TU: PUBLIC.AUDIT_LOG FOREIGN KEY(USER_ID) REFERENCES PUBLIC.USERS(ID) (CAST(1 AS BIGINT))"; SQL statement: insert into audit_log (action,details,timestamp,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) [23506-224]] [insert into audit_log (action,details,timestamp,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,default)]; SQL [insert into audit_log (action,details,timestamp,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,default)]; constraint [FKK4ALALWU62GJ4TFBGFEFLL3TU]
